ddl.value:
(
        "role" = 'dm'
        and "character_id" is null
        and "scope_key" = 'dm'
      ) or (
        "role" = 'player'
        and "character_id" is not null
        and "scope_key" = ('character:' || "character_id")
      )
ddl.name: access_credentials_scope_matches_role

ddl.value:
(
        "role" = 'dm'
        and "character_id" is null
      ) or (
        "role" = 'player'
        and "character_id" is not null
      )
ddl.name: access_sessions_role_matches_scope

ddl.value: ("pinned_at" is null and "pin_rank" is null) or "state" = 'published'
ddl.name: communication_items_pin_fields_require_published

ddl.value: "ended_at" is null or "starts_at" is null or "ended_at" >= "starts_at"
ddl.name: sessions_ended_at_after_starts_at
